rule: literal line endings are normalized (CRLF and lone CR to LF) while a  character reference is preserved as a real CR and re-serialized as
provenance: derived from W3C Canonical XML 1.0 REC (xml-c14n-20010315) §3.4 together with XML 1.0 §2.11 end-of-line handling rules; expected output computed by hand from the spec rules, not from a third-party tool. See v18 for the verbatim §3.4 REC worked example that also exercises .
